notes: Bumped hosted Streamlit dependency to streamlit[auth]>=1.45.0 and authlib>=1.3.2 to support st.login().
Added a login dependency check so a missing Authlib install shows a clear message instead of an internal server error.
Kept the empty input-like bar removed and retained download-only wording for logged-out visitors.
README now instructs Streamlit Cloud users to clear cache and reboot after updating requirements.
